Sea Gold Anti Fog Gel Mask Visor Cleaning Solution Outdoor - 1.25oz

When you are scuba diving or snorkeling, there is nothing more annoying than a fogged-up dive mask. So why mess around with just any anti-fog treatment? De-fog with Sea Gold.

Key Features

  • Highly concentrated anti-fog gel
  • Powerful, long lasting formula provides fog-free protection
  • Non-abrasive; safe for all glass and plastic lenses
  • Will not harm surrounding silicone or rubber support frames
  • Works in all water temperatures

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 40852-532
  • UPC: 664908037379
  • Size: 1.25 oz

Sea Gold by is a powerful formula that lasts longer than other anti-fog treatments. Its highly concentrated, so a little goes a long way. And it is even effective through multiple dives. Sea Gold is easy to throw in your pocket for quick use in any water temperature and in any conditions. It is safe for glass and plastic lenses, and will not harm silicone or rubber mask frames.

Avid scuba divers, instructors and professional gear testers alike agree: Sea Gold is the best anti-fog treatment out there. Use Sea Gold and you will enjoy diving as it was meant to be: completely fog-free.
